setting: France, 1917 — the Western Front, a muddy sector of trenches near the Somme
North Sea, 1952 — aboard a commercial fishing trawler found drifting forty miles off the Scottish coast
Prague, 1612 — the laboratory and apartments of a Royal Alchemist in the Hradcany district
Yucatan jungle, 1887 — a remote cenote considered sacred and secret by a local Maya community
Russian steppe, 1888 — the Trans-Siberian postal express, three days east of Ekaterinburg
Rome, 1st century AD — the Circus Maximus, during the most lucrative chariot race of the year
A small English village, 1963 — a quaint house on Unicorn Lane, just off Teddy Bear Close
Deep space, 2187 — a research vessel in orbit around Pluto, crewed by an order of 'data-monks' who maintain the solar network's memory archives
Louisiana Territory, 1805 — a remote plantation house deep in the bayou, visited by a French government surveyor
The Hyborian Age — the top of a windowless sorcerer's tower in the city of Tarantia, Kingdom of Aquilonia
